prestazioni: L15B7 (1.5L DOHC i-VTEC Turbo) engine: Full bolt-on turbo upgrade with Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger, custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe by HKS, and PRL Motorsports intercooler piping kit with Mishimoto aluminum core intercooler to handle 22 psi boost levels while maintaining 93 octane fuel compatibility.

Custom ECU reflash via Hondata KPro V4 with bespoke dyno-tuned calibration targeting 240 whp and 220 lb-ft torque, optimized for 6,800 RPM redline with aggressive ignition timing and fuel maps for the L15B7’s direct injection system, including ethanol flex-fuel support up to E50.

Full drivetrain reinforcement: OS Giken Super Lock limited-slip differential, K-Tuned 80mm aluminum short shifter with carbon fiber shift knob, and Clutch Masters FX500 twin-disc clutch with billet flywheel to handle increased torque without slip, paired with a lightweight aluminum driveshaft from Driveshaft Shop.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody conversion kit (JDM-spec for Insight Exclusive), including custom-fabricated front fenders, rear quarter panels, and carbon fiber overfenders with aggressive 30mm spacers to clear Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +35 wheels wrapped in Toyo R888R 245/40/18 tires.

Full Rocket Bunny V3 aero kit (Insight-specific), featuring a carbon fiber front lip with integrated canards, side skirts with air curtains, and a duckbill rear wing with adjustable carbon fiber gurney flaps, all painted in Honda’s exclusive ‘Candy Orange’ with matte black accents.

Interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (JDM-spec, reclining mechanism removed for fixed-back racing position), Takata Drift III 4-point harnesses, and a custom MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with quick-release hub, paired with a full carbon fiber dash overlay by Seibon and a digital gauge cluster from Defi Advance BF.
